passive.name: Death in Lavender
passive.description: Bel'Veth gains permanent attack speed stacks after taking down large minions and monsters and champions. She also gains temporary bonus attack speed after using an ability.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{cis|Bel'Veth}} attack speed cap is greatly increased, but her {{as|{{sti|attack speed}}}} does not grow by {{sti|xp|leveling up}}. The damage dealt by her basic attacks (including {{tip|on-hit}} effects) is reduced.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Bel'Veth's''' [[champion ability|ability]] casts generate stacks of ''Death in Lavender'', which lasts a few seconds and stacks up to a cap. While '''Bel'Veth''' has stacks, she becomes {{tip|ghosted}} and gains {{as|{{sti|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}}. Her basic attacks consume stacks.
wiki_detail.blurb3: {{sbc|Innate:}} When '''Bel'Veth''' scores a {{tip|takedown}} against an enemy {{tip|champion}} or {{tip|monster}}, she generates a permanent stack of ''Lavender''.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|Lavender:}} For each stack, '''Bel'Veth''' gains {{as|{{sti|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Bel'Veth''' attacks 36% faster than the median champion and her attack speed cap is modified to 90, but all sources of damage (including {{tip|on-hit}} effects) dealt by her basic attacks are reduced to 75%. Her {{as|attack speed}} does not increase through [[Growth#Increasing_Statistics|growth (per level)]].
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Bel'Veth's''' [[champion ability|ability]] casts each generate 2 [[stack]]s of ''Death in Lavender'', lasting for 5 seconds, refreshing on basic attacks and subsequent casts, and stacking up to 6 times. While '''Bel'Veth''' has stacks, she becomes {{tip|ghosted}} and gains {{sti|{{as|{{pp|20+(20/17)*(x-1)*(0.7025+0.0175*(x-1))|key=%}} '''bonus''' attack speed}}}}. Her [[basic attack]]s each consume 1 stack.
wiki_detail.description3:
{{sbc|Innate:}} Whenever '''Bel'Veth''' scores a {{tip|takedown}} against a {{tip|champion}}, {{tip|monster}}, or large {{tip|minion}} within 3 seconds of damaging them, she generates a permanent stack of ''Lavender''. Large minions and monsters generate 1 stack, champions and epic monsters generate 2 stacks.

{{sbc|Lavender:}} For each stack, '''Bel'Veth''' gains {{as|{{pp|0.28 to 1 for 17|key=%}} '''bonus''' attack speed}}.

Q.name: Void Surge
Q.description: Bel'Veth dashes in a chosen direction and damages all enemies she passes through.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Bel'Veth}} {{tip|dashes}} in the target direction, though not through [[terrain]], dealing {{as|physical damage}} to enemies she passes through.
wiki_detail.blurb2: ''Void Surge'' can be cast only within a cardinal direction that is off cooldown, each direction has a unique {{sti|cooldown}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Bel'Veth''' {{tip|dashes}} in the designated direction, though not through terrain, dealing {{as|physical damage}} to enemies she passes through. Against the first target, ''Void Surge'' can {{tip|critically strike}} for {{as|{{critical damage|{{ccd|Bel'Veth|crit_base}}|100}} physical damage}} and applies {{tip|on-hit}} effects at 75% effectiveness and {{stil|life steal}} at 100% effectiveness.
wiki_detail.description2: ''Void Surge'' deals {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}} to {{tip|monsters}} and modified damage against {{tip|minions}}.
wiki_detail.description3: ''Void Surge'' can be cast only within a cardinal direction that is off cooldown, and incurs a cooldown between casts. {{tt|Each cardinal direction|Total of 4 directions}} has a unique {{sti|cooldown}} that is reduced equivalent to {{fd|0.25}} [[ability haste]] per {{tt|{{as|1% '''bonus''' attack speed}}|Benefits from all sources of bonus attack speed except the temporary bonus from Death in Lavender}}. These cooldowns reset upon [[death|respawning]].
wiki_detail.description4: ''Void Surge {{tip|basic attack reset|resets}} '''Bel'Veth's''' basic attack timer.''
wiki_detail.leveling2:
{{st|Monster Bonus Physical Damage|{{ap|45 to 85}}|Total Monster Damage|{{ap|10+45 to 30+85}} {{as|(+ 100% AD)}}}}
{{st|Modified Minion Damage|{{ap|60 to 100}}%}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* The icon partially darkens based on the combination of dashes available. When all dashes are expended, the cooldown indicates the next available dash.
* While in {{ai|Endless Banquet|Bel'Veth|True Form}}, ''Void Surge's'' dash distance is extended up to {{tt|225|Pending for test}} units when targeted across terrain.
* The basic attack reset is not considered one for {{ri|Hail of Blades}}.
* ''Void Surge'' can be {{tip|dodge|dodged}} and {{tip|block|blocked}} only as the first enemy hit.

W.name: Above and Below
W.description: Bel'Veth slams her tail to the ground, damaging, knocking up, and slowing her enemies.
W.tooltip: Bel'Veth slams her tail, dealing {{ damage }} magic damage, Knocking Up foes for {{ duration }} seconds, and Slowing them by {{ slowpercent*100 }}% for {{ slowduration }} seconds. If a champion is hit, this refreshes the Cooldown of Void Surge in that direction.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Bel'Veth}} slams her tail in the target direction that deals {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit, briefly {{tip|airborne|knocking up}} and {{tip|slow|slowing}} them.
wiki_detail.blurb2: If this hits an enemy {{tip|champion}}, it {{sti|cdr|resets}} ''{{ais|Void Surge|Bel'Veth}}'' dash cooldown of the target direction.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Bel'Veth''' slams her tail down in the target direction that deals {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit, {{tip|airborne|knocks them up}} for {{fd|0.75}} seconds, and {{tip|slow|slows}} them by 50% for a duration.
wiki_detail.leveling:
{{st|Magic Damage|{{ap|70 to 230}} {{as|(+ 100% '''bonus''' AD)}} {{as|(+ 125% AP)}}}}
{{st|Slow Duration|{{ap|1.25 to 2.25}} seconds}}
wiki_detail.description2: If this hits an enemy {{tip|champion}}, it resets ''{{ais|Void Surge|Bel'Veth}}'' dash {{sti|cooldown}} of the target direction.
wiki_detail.range: {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} 0 - {{tip|er|icononly = true}} 660 <!--this max range measurement is still kinda weird and may need more testing-->
_comments: this max range measurement is still kinda weird and may need more testing

E.name: Royal Maelstrom
E.description: Bel'Veth roots herself in place, channeling a storm of slashes around her that targets the lowest-health enemy and grants her lifesteal and damage reduction.

wiki_detail.blurb:
{{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Bel'Veth}} enters a brief defensive stance, gaining {{sti|life steal}} and damage reduction.
During this time, '''Bel'Veth''' rapidly slashes at the most wounded enemy, with the max number of slashes increased based on {{as|her '''bonus''' attack speed}}. Each slash deals {{as|physical damage}}, and {{tip|applies lifesteal|applies}} {{stil|life steal}}, {{tip|on-hit}} and [[Ability effects|spell]] effects based on the {{as|target's '''missing''' health}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: ''Royal Maelstrom'' can be recast within the duration, and does so automatically afterwards or when '''Bel'Veth''' casts an ability.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Bel'Veth''' enters a defensive stance for {{fd|1.5}} seconds, during which she is unable to move, but gains {{sti|life steal|20%}} (+ {{tt|100% life steal|Does not apply to the life steal gained from Royal Maelstrom}}) [[life steal]] and damage reduction.
wiki_detail.description2: While active, she rapidly slashes at the nearest enemy with the lowest {{as|'''current''' health}} percentage for up to 6 (+ 1 per {{tt|{{as|{{fd|33.{{recurring|3}}}}% '''bonus''' attack speed}}|Benefits from all sources of bonus attack speed}}) times over the duration. Each slash deals {{as|physical damage}}, increased by {{as|{{pp|key=%|key1=%|type=target's '''missing''' health|0 to 300 for 11|0 to 100|formula=3% per 1% of target's '''missing''' health}}|health}}, and applies {{tip|on-hit}}, {{tip|on-attack}}, and [[Ability effects|spell]] effects at {{as|{{pp|key=%|key1=%|type=target's '''missing''' health|8 to 32 for 11|0 to 100|formula=0.24% per 1% of target's '''missing''' health}}|health}} effectiveness.
wiki_detail.leveling2: {{st|Minimum Physical Damage per hit|{{ap|6 to 10}} {{as|(+ 8% AD)}}|Maximum Physical Damage per hit|{{ap|6*4 to 10*4}} {{as|(+ {{ap|8*4}}% AD)}}}}
wiki_detail.description3: ''Royal Maelstrom'' deals 150% damage to {{tip|monsters}}, {{tip|applies lifesteal|applies}} {{stil|life steal}} at 100% effectiveness, and is affected by {{tip|critical strike}} modifiers. '''Bel'Veth''' cannot perform slashes while unable to declare basic attacks.
wiki_detail.leveling3: {{st|Minimum Monster Damage per hit|{{ap|6*1.5 to 10*1.5}} {{as|(+ {{ap|8*1.5}}% AD)}}|Maximum Monster Damage per hit|{{ap|6*4*1.5 to 10*4*1.5}} {{as|(+ {{ap|8*4*1.5}}% AD)}}}}
wiki_detail.description4: ''Royal Maelstrom'' can be recast after {{fd|0.75}} seconds within the duration, and does so automatically after the duration or when '''Bel'Veth''' casts an ability.
wiki_detail.description6: ''The target does not have to be {{tip|sight|visible}} to be hit by this ability.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* Applies {{tip|spell damage}} and procs {{tip|basic damage}} required effects.
* ''Royal Maelstrom'' does not prioritize champions over other units.
* '''Bel'Veth''' cannot attack [[structure]]s, [[ward]]s, nor [[jungle plants]] with ''Royal Maelstrom''.
* If '''Bel'Veth''' is {{tip|berserk|berserked}} or {{tip|taunt|taunted}}, she will slash at the unit she is forced to attack.
* Each slash's damage triggers a stack of {{ri|Conqueror}}.
* Despite this ability's cooldown starts on cast, it cannot be reduced by {{iis|Navori Flickerblade}} {{nie|Transcendence}} during the effect of this ability.{{bug|1}} Cooldowns of the other basic abilities can be normally reduced during this ability, though.
* The following table refers for interactions while '''Bel'Veth''' is performing ''Royal Maelstrom'':
{{ct|attack=false|move=false|cast=interrupts|items=interrupts|consume=true|spells=true,interrupts,false,false,true|interrupts=death}}

R.name: Endless Banquet
R.description: Bel'Veth consumes Void coral remnants, transforming into her true form and increasing her max health, attack range, attack speed, and out-of-combat move speed. Consuming the Void coral remnants of a Void epic monster will grant her a longer ultimate duration, as well as the power to summon Void remora.
R.tooltip:
Passive: Every second Attack against the same target deals an additional {{ finalonhitdamage }} true damage, stacking infinitely. Takedowns against champions and epic monsters leave behind a piece of Void Coral.

Active: Consuming Void Coral grants {{ passivestacksondevour }} Lavender stack and activates Bel'Veth's true form for {{ steroidduration }} seconds. Void Coral from Void epic monsters increases the duration to {{ voidduration }} seconds and causes minions that die nearby to become Void Remora. While casting, Bel'Veth Slows nearby enemies before exploding, dealing {{ totalexplosiondamage }} + {{ missinghealthdamage*100 }}% missing-Health true damage.

In her true form, Bel'Veth gains {{ maxhealthondevour }} max Health, {{ oocms }} Move Speed out of combat, {{ bonusaarange }} Attack range, {{ totalasmod*100 }}% Total Attack Speed, and Void Surge can pass through walls.


{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Passive:}} '''Bel'Veth's''' basic attacks {{tip|on-hit}} apply a mark to the target for 5 seconds, refreshing on subsequent hits. Every second attack {{tip|on-hit}} against the marked target deals {{ccs|{{as|'''bonus''' true damage}}|true}} and generates a stack of ''Endless Banquet'' that increases this damage by the same value. This effect stacks infinitely, but is capped at 5 stacks against epic {{tip|monsters}}. The mark and stacks expire upon attacking a new target.
wiki_detail.leveling:
{{st|Bonus True Damage|{{ap|6 to 10}} {{as|(+ 12% '''bonus''' AD)}}}}
{{st|Maximum Monster Damage|{{ap|6*5 to 10*5}} {{as|(+ {{ap|12*5}}% '''bonus''' AD)}}}}
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Passive:}} When '''Bel'Veth''' scores a {{tip|takedown}} against an enemy {{tip|champion}} or epic {{tip|monster}} while alive, a ''Void Coral'' is spawned from their corpse for 15 seconds. {{ui|Baron Nashor}}, the pit {{ui|Rift Herald}}, and {{ui|Voidgrub|Voidgrubs}} (once per spawn group) spawn an ''Enhanced Void Coral''.
wiki_detail.description3:
{{sbc|Active:}} '''Bel'Veth''' {{tip|dashes}} to the target ''Void Coral'' to consume it over the cast time, {{tip|slow|slowing}} nearby enemies by {{pp|type=seconds elapsed|key=%|25;42;69;96|0 to 0.75|changedisplay=true}} for the duration. She then creates an explosion at the location to deal {{sti|{{as|true damage}}}} to enemies within, capped at {{as|1500|true damage}} versus monsters, and assumes her {{sbc|True Form}} for 60 seconds.
'''Bel'Veth''' consumes all existing ''Void Corals'' at once, generating a stack of ''{{ai|Death in Lavender|Bel'Veth|Lavender}}'' for each one consumed.
wiki_detail.leveling3: {{st|True Damage|{{ap|150 to 250}} {{as|(+ 100% AP)}} {{as|(+ 25% of target's '''missing''' health)}}}}
wiki_detail.description4:
{{sbc|True Form:}} '''Bel'Veth''' evolves into a monster, gaining {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' health}}}}, {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} [[combat status|out-of-combat]], {{sti|75 '''bonus''' attack range}}, as well as increased {{as|'''total''' attack speed}}. ''{{ai|Void Surge|Bel'Veth}}'' can {{tip|dash}} through [[terrain]]. Consuming a ''Void Coral'' {{tt|refreshes|See notes}} the duration of {{sbc|True Form}} and {{tip|heal|heals}} '''Bel'Veth'''.

{{sbc|Enhanced Void Coral Bonus:}} {{sbc|True Form}} is empowered to last 180 seconds and causes ''Void Remora'' to spawn from allied and enemy {{tip|minions}} that die nearby.
wiki_detail.description5: ''A nearby Void Coral is required to cast this ability. The {{tip|on-hit}} modifiers from {{ai|Death in Lavender|Bel'Veth}}, {{ai|Void Surge|Bel'Veth}} and {{ai|Royal Maelstrom|Bel'Veth}} affect the {{as|'''bonus''' true damage}} applied by Endless Banquet's passive. See [[Bel'Veth/LoL#Pets|Pets]] for details about Void Remora and Void Corals.''
wiki_detail.callforhelp:
|notes        = 
* Applies {{tip|proc damage}} on the bonus true damage and deals {{tip|area damage}} on the explosion.
* ''Endless Banquet's'' {{tip|takedown}} effect will not trigger against monsters if they were slain by an enemy.
* ''Endless Banquet's'' true damage based on the target's missing health is calculated ''before'' the base damage is dealt.
* ''True Form's'' duration is displayed in '''Bel'Veth's''' resource bar, in seconds.
* ''True Form's'' duration is refreshed based on the type of ''Void Coral'' that '''Bel'Veth''' consumes.
** Consuming a normal ''Void Coral'' in a normal ''True Form'' state refreshes the duration to 60 seconds.
** Consuming an enhanced ''Void Coral'' refreshes the duration to 180 seconds and grants the enhanced effects regardless of current ''True Form'' state.
** If she consumes a normal ''Void Coral'' while in an enhanced ''True Form'' state, the current duration is extended by 60 seconds.
*** The enhanced effects are '''not''' lost in this case.
* '''Bel'Veth''' will consume all existing ''Void Corals'' at once, therefore she is able to acquire the enhanced effects of ''True Form'' even if she does not physically consume an enhanced ''Void Coral''.
* The ''Void Coral'' that '''Bel'Veth''' consumes herself will not expire in the process of her doing so.
* '''Bel'Veth''' will consume all other ''Void Corals'' upon consumption regardless of range.
* Ranking up ''Endless Banquet'' will update the bonuses dynamically; if '''Bel'Veth''' has ''True Form'' upon the level-up, she will receive the upgraded stats.
* '''Bel'Veth''' gains the '''bonus''' health and heal from ''Endless Banquet'' at the start of the cast time.
* '''Bel'Veth''' will be able to consume the target ''Void Coral'' even if her dash is interrupted.
** She dashes at the start of the cast time.
* A ''Void Coral'' will '''not''' spawn when scoring a {{tip|takedown}} against a summoned {{ui|Rift Herald}}.
{{Effect at cast time start}}
* The following table refers for interactions while '''Bel'Veth''' is in cast time:
** She remains locked out for {{fd|0.5}} seconds after the cast time completes.
{{ct|cast=false|move=false|attack=false|items=false|consume=false|spells=true,false,false,false,false|interrupts=revival-false}}
<!-- Blurb -->
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Passive:}} Every second basic attack on the same target deals {{as|'''bonus''' true damage}} and generates a stack that increases the damage. This can stack infinitely, and expires after a short time or upon switching targets.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Passive:}} {{tip|Takedowns}} against enemy {{tip|champions}} and epic {{tip|monsters}} spawn a ''Void Coral'' for some time. Taking down {{ui|Baron Nashor}}, the pit {{ui|Rift Herald}}, or a {{ui|Voidgrub}} spawns an ''Enhance Void Coral''.
wiki_detail.blurb3: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Bel'Veth''' {{tip|dashes}} to the target ''Void Coral'', gradually {{tip|slow|slowing}} nearby enemies before violently exploding, dealing {{as|true damage}} based on {{as|their '''missing''' health}} and assuming her {{sbc|True Form}} for a while. Consuming an ''Enhanced Void Coral'' enhances her {{sbc|True Form}}.
wiki_detail.blurb4:
{{sbc|True Form:}} '''Bel'Veth''' gains bonus {{sti|{{as|health}}}}, out of combat {{sti|{{as|move speed}}}}, {{sti|attack range}}, and increased {{as|'''total''' attack speed}}. During this time, ''{{ai|Void Surge|Bel'Veth}}'' can {{tip|dash}} through terrain, consuming more ''Void Corals'' renews the form's duration and {{sti|heal|{{as|heals her|heal}}}} instead.

{{sbc|Enhanced Void Coral Bonus:}} {{sbc|True Form}} is empowered with a longer duration and causes ''Void Remora'' to spawn from minions that die nearby.
